subtitle.en: Halobacterium uses a retinal-protein pump (BR) instead of chlorophyll; the protein-bound retinal absorbs 570 nm green-yellow → reflects purple — same kind of pigment as in your eye, very different host
subtitle.ko: Halobacterium은 엽록소 대신 BR retinal-단백질 펌프 사용 — 단백질 결합 retinal이 570 nm 흡수, 자색 반사

description.en: Halobacterium cell coloured by BR. Toggle 'soluble retinal' (440 nm, yellow) vs 'protein-bound' (570 nm, purple) to show how the opsin pocket tunes λ_max.
description.ko: BR로 색칠된 Halobacterium. soluble retinal(440 nm 황) vs protein-bound(570 nm 자) 토글 — opsin pocket이 λ_max 조정.
